name: Hari Daniya Ki Chatni (Green Coriander Chutney)
recipeInstructions:
The ultimate relish for samosas, pakoras and any other savory snack!
1. Grind, pound or blend the coriander leaves, green chillies, ginger and half a teaspoon of salt to make a thick paste.
2. Stir in the lemon juice and add sugar and extra salt to taste.
